# AzureMonitorPipelineLogErrors

Errors occurred during Azure Monitor pipeline data collection, transformation, and export.

## Table attributes

|Attribute|Value|
|---|---|
|**Resource types**|microsoft.monitor/pipelinegroups|
|**Categories**|Azure Resources|
|**Solutions**| LogManagement|
|**Basic log**|Yes|
|**Ingestion-time DCR support**|No|
|**Lake-only ingestion**|No|
|**Sample Queries**|[Yes](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/queries/azuremonitorpipelinelogerrors)|

## Columns

| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| _BilledSize | real | The record size in bytes |
| Instance | string | Replica id of the Azure Monitor PipelineGroup. |
| _IsBillable | string | Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable is `false` ingestion isn't billed to your Azure account |
| Location | string | Azure region where the PipelineGroup is deployed. |
| Message | string | User friendly log message describing the error. |
| Name | string | Azure Monitor pipeline name. |
| OperationName | string | Pipeline operation name. Well-known values: Ingestion, Transform, Export, Other. |
| Properties | dynamic | Additional properties. |
| _ResourceId | string | A unique identifier for the resource that the record is associated with |
| SourceSystem | string | The type of agent the event was collected by. For example, `OpsManager` for Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager, `Linux` for all Linux agents, or `Azure` for Azure Diagnostics |
| _SubscriptionId | string | A unique identifier for the subscription that the record is associated with |
| TenantId | string | The Log Analytics workspace ID |
| TimeGenerated | datetime | The timestamp (UTC) of when the log was generated. |
| Type | string | The name of the table |
